name: telecommunications_recall_notice_millhaven_tru_loy
premise: An emergency alert gateway accepted an unsigned test message that reached live handsets in two counties. In Telecommunications, the situation tagged internally around telecommunications recall notice millhaven tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make truth feel morally loud today, while loyalty is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Darius Dubois
agents.identity: I am Darius Dubois, the accountable executive on this bridge in Telecommunications. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mateo Petrov
agents.identity: I am Mateo Petrov, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Telecommunications. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so loyalty does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so truth does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Darius Dubois must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Darius Dubois do?
